summary: Landing Page Screenshot-to-Illustration Swap - Complete frontend testing. All three new illustration components (DashboardMock, QuoteMock, PortalMock) render correctly. Hero section shows DashboardMock in browser chrome frame. Features section shows DashboardMock in hero frame and all 3 feature cards with their respective illustration components. All CTA buttons navigate to /signup, login flow works with test credentials.
critical_code_review_comments: DashboardMock.tsx correctly implements inline CSS styles (no Tailwind) with dark theme (#0A0814 background)
QuoteMock.tsx correctly implements quote builder layout with line items, totals, and client preview
PortalMock.tsx correctly implements light-mode client portal (#F9F7FE background) - intentional design choice
LandingPageV2.tsx correctly imports and uses all three illustration components
Feature cards array correctly maps component references to card.component JSX
All data-testid attributes present for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Screenshot-to-illustration swap complete. WebP files in /public/screenshots/ are no longer referenced. All illustration components use inline CSS styles. PortalMock is intentionally light mode (#F9F7FE background).

Landing_Page_Loads.details: Page loads at / with no console errors

Hero_Section_DashboardMock.details: DashboardMock renders in hero browser chrome frame with KOLOR logo, sidebar nav (Dashboard active, Leads, Quotes, Contracts, Calendar, Settings), stats (24 Total Leads, 8 New, 6 Quoted, 10 Booked), leads table (Jessica Liu, Marcus Reid, Anika Kapoor)

Floating_Activity_Pills.details: 3 floating activity pills render in hero section (Quote accepted, New inquiry, Contract signed)

Features_Hero_Frame_DashboardMock.details: Full DashboardMock renders in features section hero frame with sidebar (KOLOR logo, Sarah Chen user block, Dashboard active, Leads with 47 badge, Quotes with 3 badge, Contracts, Calendar), stat cards (Active Leads 47, Quotes Sent 12, Revenue $24k, Signed 8), leads table (5 rows: Jessica Liu, Marcus Reid, Anika Kapoor, Sophie Laurent, Tom Walsh), activity feed (5 items)

Feature_Card_1_Lead_Management.details: DashboardMock renders in Lead Management feature card illustration area

Feature_Card_2_Quote_Builder.details: QuoteMock renders with quote builder layout, client card, line items (Full-day coverage, Second photographer, Engagement session, Premium album design), totals showing $4,200.00, right column with quote value and stats

Feature_Card_3_Online_Contracts.details: PortalMock renders with light-mode client portal (#F9F7FE background), 'Hi Jessica' greeting, quote card, timeline (Quote sent, Your approval, Sign contract, Booking confirmed), Approve quote button, signature area

Login_Flow.details: Login with bookingtest@test.com / password123 redirects to dashboard

Console_Errors.details: No critical console errors (only expected 401 errors from auth API calls when not logged in)
